Short title and commencement.-(1) These rules may be called the National Green Tribunal (Recruitment, Salaries and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Officers and other Employees) Amendment Rules, 2019. 2. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 3. In the National Green Tribunal (Recruitment, Salaries and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Officers and other Employees) Rules, 2011, in the Schedule, against serial number 9 relating to Private Secretary in column 11 under the heading “Promotion” for the word “six years” the words “five years”, shall be substituted. [F. No. 17(23)/2010-PL/NGT (Pt.)] YASHVIR SINGH, Economic Advisor Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (i) vide notification number G.S.R 458(E), dated, the 17th June, 2011 and subsequent amendment vide notification G.S.R. 1362 (E) dated 2nd November, 2017.
